global_description: Small mammal with a rounded body covered in short spines, typically brown or gray. It has a pointed snout, small eyes, and short legs. The spines are stiff and sharp, providing protection.

part_details.head: Small with a pointed snout and small eyes
part_details.body: Rounded, covered in short, stiff spines
part_details.spines: Short, stiff, and sharp, covering the back
part_details.legs: Short and sturdy, adapted for walking
